understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each KA59 level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+', with the win condition requiring that all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement consisted of directional moves (up/down/left/right) for the currently selected piece, and selecting/switching pieces was done via CLICK on a piece’s position. Pieces could not pass through walls/obstacles; attempted moves or clicks that would result in an invalid move were blocked and had no effect. When multiple selectable pieces existed, only the selected one responded to movement, and puzzle completion required coordinating their final positions simultaneously on the goal tiles.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each KA59 level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+', with the win condition requiring that all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement consisted of directional moves (up/down/left/right) for the currently selected piece, and selecting/switching pieces was done via CLICK on a piece’s position. Pieces could not pass through walls/obstacles; attempted moves or clicks that would result in an invalid move were blocked and had no effect. When multiple selectable pieces existed, only the selected one responded to movement, and puzzle completion required coordinating their final positions simultaneously on the goal tiles.
